texto: But most of all I was inspired by the stirring examples of all the other runners. In some pictures they would seem like tiny dots in a mosaic, but each had a separate narrative starting a few months or a lifetime earlier and finishing that day in the New York City Marathon, the race with 37,000 stories.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Mark Sutcliffe: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “But most of all I was inspired by the stirring examples of all the other runners. In some picture…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, new-york-city-marathon, running pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e estudos.
